pest-killer.name: Pest killer
pest-killer.description: Small enemies might not seem very dangerous, but it's not that easy to hit them!

giant-slayer.name: Giant killer
giant-slayer.description: Large opponents might seem scary, but just don't get hit and you should be fine!

evasion.name: Evasion
evasion.description: Ability to evade attacks. You cannot do it while using a shield

shield-blocking.name: Shield blocking
shield-blocking.description: Ability to block attacks with shield. You cannot evade while using one

unarmed.name: Unarmed
unarmed.description: It's definitely, unquestionably, undoubtedly better to just use a weapon instead of doing this. But sure, why not?

stance-mastery.name: Stance proficiency
stance-mastery.description: Knowledge on how to apply different stances in combat

quick-steps.name: Quick steps
quick-steps.description: A swift and precise technique that abandons strength in favor of greater speed

heavy-strike.name: Crushing force
heavy-strike.description: A powerful and dangerous technique that abandons speed in favor of overwhelmingly strong attacks

wide-swing.name: Broad arc
wide-swing.description: A special technique that allows striking multiple enemies at once, although at a cost of lower overall efficiency. Slightly reduces xp and loot.

defensive-measures.name: Defensive measures
defensive-measures.description: A careful technique focused much more on defense than on attacking

berserkers-stride.name: Berserker's stride
berserkers-stride.description: A wild and dangerous technique that focuses on dealing as much damage as possible, while completely ignoring own defense

flowing-water.name: Flowing water
flowing-water.description: A wild and dangerous technique that focuses on dealing as much damage as possible, while completely ignoring own defense

spatial-awareness.name: Spatial awareness
spatial-awareness.description: Understanding where you are in relation to other creatures and objects

tight-maneuvers.name: Tight maneuvers
tight-maneuvers.description: Learn how to fight in narrow environment, where there's not much space for dodging attacks

presence-sensing.name: Presence sensing
presence-sensing.description: Ability to sense a presence without using your eyes

strength-of-mind.name: Strength of mind
strength-of-mind.description: Resist and reject the unnatural influence. Turn your psyche into an iron fortress

scrambling.name: Scrambling
scrambling.description: Ability to act quickly and with secure footing in rough, loose, or unstable ground

heat-resistance.name: Heat resistance
heat-resistance.description: Ability to survive and function in high temperatures

cold-resistance.name: Cold resistance
cold-resistance.description: Ability to survive and function in low temperatures

dazzle-resistance.name: Dazzle resistance
dazzle-resistance.description: Don't look at the sun, it's bad for your eyes

spears.name: Spearmanship
spears.description: The ability to fight with the most deadly weapon in history

hammers.name: Hammer combat
hammers.description: Ability to fight with battle hammers. Why bother trying to cut someone, when you can just crack all their bones?

daggers.name: Dagger combat
daggers.description: The disdained art of fighting (and stabbing) with daggers

wands.name: Wand casting
wands.description: Ability to cast spells with magic wands, increases damage dealt

staffs.name: Staff casting
staffs.description: Ability to cast spells with magic staffs, increases damage dealt

farming.name: Farming
farming.description: Even a simple action of plowing some fields, can be performed better with skills and experience

sleeping.name: Sleeping
sleeping.description: Good, regular sleep is the basis of getting stronger and helps your body heal

running.name: Running
running.description: Great way to improve the efficiency of the body

weightlifting.name: Weightlifting
weightlifting.description: No better way to get stronger than by lifting heavy things

swimming.name: Swimming
swimming.description: A nice, gentle, and relaxing exercise. Just remember to be careful

equilibrium.name: Equilibrium
equilibrium.description: Nothing will throw you off your balance (at least the physical one)

climbing.name: Climbing
climbing.description: Intense and slightly dangerous form of training that involves majority of your muscles

woodcutting.name: Woodcutting
woodcutting.description: Get better with chopping the wood

mining.name: Mining
mining.description: Get better with mining the ores

digging.name: Digging
digging.description: Get better with swinging the shovel

herbalism.name: Herbalism
herbalism.description: Knowledge of useful plants and mushrooms

animal-handling.name: Animal handling
animal-handling.description: Knowledge and skills required to deal with a wide variety of animals

fishing.name: Fishing
fishing.description: Get better at luring all kinds of fish

crafting-mastery.name: Crafting mastery
crafting-mastery.description: A mastery of the minor crafting branches like tinkering, woodworking, or butchering

crafting.name: Tinkering
crafting.description: Turn smaller pieces into one bigger thing

smelting.name: Smelting
smelting.description: Turning raw ore into raw metal

forging.name: Forging
forging.description: Turning raw metal into something useful

alchemy.name: Alchemy
alchemy.description: Extracting and enhancing useful properties of the ingredients

butchering.name: Butchering
butchering.description: Making the most of what you kill

woodworking.name: Woodworking
woodworking.description: Turning wood logs into something useful

iron-skin.name: Tough skin
iron-skin.description: Wearing no protective armor means that your skin keeps getting damaged in combat, which leads to it regenerating over and over to become tougher

fortitude.name: Fortitude
fortitude.description: Pretend the wounds are not there

persistence.name: Persistence
persistence.description: Do not give up, no matter what

perception.name: Perception
perception.description: Better grasp on your senses allows you to notice small and hidden things, as well as to discern the true nature of what you observe

literacy.name: Literacy
literacy.description: Ability to read and understand written text

medicine.name: Medicine
medicine.description: Create better medicaments and improve your skill at treating wounds

gluttony.name: Gluttony
gluttony.description: The more you eat the better you will be at digesting, right?

breathing.name: Breathing
breathing.description: Oxygen is the most important resource for improving the performance of your body. Learn how to take it in more efficiently

regeneration.name: Regeneration
regeneration.description: As your body regenerates more and more, it slowly becomes more proficient in this task
